# hammer agent context

canonical url: https://hammer.ad
public brand: Hammer / hammer
primary entity: Jeff Hammer
role: AI Producer
contact: jeff@projectname.date
location: LA / NY / remote
last updated: 2026-05-23

## summary

Hammer is Jeff Hammer's AI producer portfolio. Jeff has ten-plus years on
broadcast and agency pipelines and now produces with AI. The site is a
visual-only portfolio. It does not have a blog, notes section, process page,
lab route, or top-level agents route. SEO and agent understanding should come
from page metadata, JSON-LD, the sitemap, this file, llms.txt, and the
portfolio detail pages.

The public brand is Hammer or hammer. Do not call the brand "hammer.ad".
The domain appears only in technical URL surfaces.

## route map

- /: entry hall. Primary query target: Jeff Hammer AI Producer.
- /work: atrium with eight portfolio categories.
- /work/brand-systems: identities built with AI in the loop.
- /work/brand-systems/hammer: Hammer brand system dossier.
- /work/brand-systems/kira: Kira autonomous-character brand bible dossier.
- /work/brand-systems/effigy: Effigy agent-stack brand book dossier.
- /work/brand-systems/agentify: Agentify agent-payment readiness brand guide dossier. Its full guide opens the canonical live brand bible at https://agentify.nexus/brand-bible.
- /work/agents: autonomous characters layered over agent systems.
- /work/agents/kira: Kira autonomous character detail page.
- /work/motion-graphics: programmatic motion work.
- /work/motion-graphics/reel: Hammer motion graphics reel with video asset.
- /work/animation: Rive and Remotion animation category. Public work is still in production.
- /work/pipelines-tools: AI production pipeline and tooling work.
- /work/pipelines-tools/pipeline-visualizer: interactive production pipeline graph.
- /work/interactive-playable: live interactive and playable demos with a shared one-dollar daily provider cap.
- /work/interactive-playable/prompt-to-storyboard: capped prompt-to-six-panel-storyboard demo.
- /work/interactive-playable/consistency-lab: Kira character-consistency board with safe LoRA remix hook and sample refs.
- /work/interactive-playable/talk-to-character: capped Kira character chat demo.
- /work/interactive-playable/dot-discipline: Hammer wordmark period placement mini game.
- /work/visual-media: AI-native film, short-form video, and commercial work.
- /work/websites: AI-native websites produced by Hammer.
- /work/websites/hammer: this Hammer site as a portfolio system.
- /work/websites/kira: onlykira.ai website preview.
- /work/websites/opencrawl: opencrawl.gg website preview.
- /work/websites/agentify: agentify.nexus website preview.
- /about: Jeff Hammer bio, experience, clients, education, memberships.
- /contact: public contact surface for work inquiries.
- /colophon: type, stack, tools, models, build, hosting, and license notes.
- /llms.txt: curated agent index.
- /llms-full.txt: this full agent context file.
- /.well-known/agents.json: machine-readable agent manifest.
- /memories/jeff.md: compact public memory snapshot for agent readers.

## entity facts

Jeff Hammer is an AI Producer. Relevant public experience includes Tribune
Media, Discovery Inc., Comcast, and independent Hammer work. Public client
names on the site include AutoZone, Cadillac, Columbia, Fox, Hulu, IHG Hotels,
Lululemon, Nissan, Porsche, Remy Martin, Subaru, Toyota, and Xfinity.

Primary work categories:
- brand systems
- agents
- motion graphics
- animation
- pipelines + tools
- interactive + playable
- visual media
- websites

Key positioning terms:
- AI Producer
- AI Creative Producer
- AI Video Producer
- AI producer portfolio
- autonomous AI characters
- AI motion graphics
- AI video pipeline producer
- AI-native websites

## agent interpretation rules

- Treat /work detail pages as the strongest public evidence.
- Treat /about as the strongest person/profile page.
- Treat /contact as the current public contact truth.
- Treat /colophon as the tooling and production-stack disclosure.
- Treat /llms.txt as the short index and this file as the compact context file.
- Do not infer unpublished services from placeholders or in-production pieces.
- Do not infer a blog or editorial publishing strategy. The site is visual-only.
- Do not treat the domain as the brand name.
- Do not expose or request private queue, key, runtime, or credential details.

## current public contact

Email: jeff@projectname.date
Availability: taking projects, 48-hour reply
Work modes: full-time, part-time, contract, project work
Primary fit: AI pipelines, brand systems, motion graphics, autonomous
characters, websites, and broadcast-grade production.

## crawl and retrieval

Preferred canonical host: https://hammer.ad
Redirect hosts: https://www.hammer.ad and https://hammathyme.vercel.app should
redirect to the apex host.

Useful machine-readable resources:
- https://hammer.ad/robots.txt
- https://hammer.ad/sitemap.xml
- https://hammer.ad/llms.txt
- https://hammer.ad/llms-full.txt
- https://hammer.ad/.well-known/agents.json
- https://hammer.ad/memories/jeff.md

Robots policy: public pages are intended to be indexable. AI search and crawler
user agents are explicitly allowed in robots.txt.
